title: [MTR4] 서울도시철도 전동차 | SMRT Trains
description: Resource pack that adds (hopefully all) Ex-Seoul Metropolitan Rapid Transit trains into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
*A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway.*

# Overview
Seoul Metropolitan Rapid Transit (서울특별시도시철도공사) was a company under the control of the Seoul Metropolitan Government. Founded in 1994, it is used to operate Seoul Subway Lines 5-8, i.e., the 4 new lines built during the 2nd phase of Seoul Subway construction. The company merged with Seoul Metro to form Seoul Transport Corporation on 31st May 2017.
 
SMRT introduced the 5000, 6000, 7000, and 8000 series to lines 5, 6, 7, and 8, respectively. Except for the 6000 series, all trains are introduced in 2 batches. They all looked visually similar, and all initially carried "CI" livery. however, trains on lines 6 to 8 switched to a new "BI" livery from 2008, following a rebranding practice.

SMRT introduced the SR000 series in 2010 for Line 7. These trains are completely different from the older trains, and have several "gimmicks" onboard, such as Windows XP computers onboard (named "Happy Touch"), and longitudinal seats at the centre of the carriage instead of the sides.

This resource pack is to add (hopefully) all Ex-SMRT trains into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in July 2025.

# What will be in this pack?
### SMRT 5000/7000/8000 series:
- 1st batch
- 2nd batch
---
- SMRT 6000 series
- Incheon Transit Corporation SR000 series

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seoul Metropolitan Rapid Transit / Seoul Transport Corporation, and Incheon Transit Corporation.
